subcodes.first_line: O beloved ones of the All-Merciful and companions of the Lord God! The gates of bounty are opened and the lights of mercy shine forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای رحمن و ای یاران حضرت یزدان ابواب موهبت گشوده است و انوار رحمت رخ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @light and darkness, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
